case_title: PAMELA DEL RIO VS. MICHAEL OSCAR ALANIZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEL RIO, PAMELA AS TO DEFENDANT STONE, JOSEPH ROBERT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-04-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-28-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT ALANIZ WAS SERVED IN LOUISIANA AND MUST BE SERVED IN CALIFORNIA. THE CERTIFIED MAIL CARD SIGNATURE FOR JOSEPH STONE IS ILLEGIBLE AND JUDGE MITCHELL NOTED THAT STONE IS NOT A PARTY TO THE LEASE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $150.00 SERVED OCT-18-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALANIZ, MICHAEL OSCAR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-28-2016 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO DEC-01-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,949.00 FILED BY DEL RIO, PAMELA AS TO DEFENDANT ALANIZ, MICHAEL OSCAR STONE, JOSEPH ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-04-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS-CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO MICHAL OSCAR ALANIZ ON 10/28/16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-UNABLE TO FORWARD."

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-01-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-01-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF PAMELA DEL RIO. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED.. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-07-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STONE, JOSEPH ROBERT
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS-CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT JOSEPH STONE ON 10/28/16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO JOSEPH ROBERT STONE ON 12/02/16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED MAR-29-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALANIZ, MICHAEL OSCAR
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO MICHAEL OSCAR ALANIZ ON 12/02/16, PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED."
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEL RIO, PAMELA AS TO DEFENDANT ALANIZ, MICHAEL OSCAR
DECLARATION BY PLAINTIFF OF CHANGE OF MAILING ADDRESS FOR DEFENDANT MICHAEL ALANIZ FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEL RIO, PAMELA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-01-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEL RIO, PAMELA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALANIZ, MICHAEL OSCAR STONE, JOSEPH ROBERT $1,949.00 PRINCIPAL, $230.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,179.00, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
